# Forever AI Components

> 596 zero-dependency, self-contained animated web components (single HTML files).
> Every component is one file: inline CSS + JS, no frameworks, works offline by double-click.
> Free to browse and download. Original works inspired by artistic styles — see /NOTICE.md.

## For agents

- Machine-readable index of every component (titles, descriptions, facets, file paths):
  https://forever-components.vercel.app/infinite/components.index.json
- Each record has `file` (e.g. `van-gogh/01-starry-flow.html`); fetch raw source at
  https://forever-components.vercel.app/infinite/<file>
- Queryable facets: role, technique, style, motion, intensity, interaction, perfTier, scheme, deps, useCases, mood, a11y
- Machine manifest: https://forever-components.vercel.app/agents.json
- Sitemap: https://forever-components.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Use

Read `components.index.json`, filter by facet (e.g. role=loader, perfTier=cheap), then GET the
tile URL to retrieve the complete, copy-pasteable component. No build step, no dependencies.
